metadata.description: Technical appendix catalog: cross-references technical reports to main briefs

reports.title: AKM Decomposition: Individual & Studio Effects
reports.description: Estimates person and studio fixed effects from production scale. Separates individual contribution from opportunity/studio factors.
reports.analyst_notes: Core component of Integrated Value (IV). CIs are analytical (SE = sigma/sqrt(n)).

reports.title: Demographic & Role Bias Analysis
reports.description: Identifies disparities in opportunity (production scale, role assignment) and outcomes by demographic and role group.
reports.analyst_notes: Gender/role gap analysis. Null model: random assignment.

reports.title: Integrated Value (IV) Component Weights
reports.description: Documents the 5 IV components: AKM, Authority (PageRank), Trust (edge weight), Credit Density, Patronage. Shows lambda weights and dormancy adjustment.
reports.algorithm: Weighted linear combination with dormancy multiplier
reports.data_source: AKM + graph centrality + edge weight aggregates
reports.analyst_notes: Lambda weights are fixed priors (CV optimization against anime.score removed). Dormancy applied multiplicatively.

reports.title: Network Centrality & Position Metrics
reports.description: Computes degree, betweenness, closeness, eigenvector centrality. Identifies central figures and key connectors.
reports.analyst_notes: Rust extension provides 50-100x speedup. Falls back to NetworkX if Rust unavailable.

reports.title: Structural Holes & Bridge Detection
reports.description: Identifies people who bridge disconnected network regions (gatekeepers, cross-studio connectors). Measures brokerage potential.
reports.analyst_notes: Key for understanding industry fragmentation and gatekeeping.

reports.title: Knowledge Spanners: High Betweenness People
reports.description: Lists people with high betweenness centrality — those who control information flow between network clusters.
reports.analyst_notes: Useful for identifying industry connectors and potential mentors/leaders.

reports.title: Double Machine Learning (DML) Causal Estimates
reports.description: Estimates causal effect of key variables (studio prestige, role type, peer network) on person FE. Uses orthogonal ML to control for confounding.
reports.algorithm: Double ML with nuisance estimation (RF), Neyman orthogonality
reports.analyst_notes: CIs are analytical (not bootstrap). Orthogonality verified via debiased LASSO.

reports.title: Causal Identification Strategy & Assumptions
reports.description: Documents causal assumptions (unconfoundedness, overlap, SUTVA). Specifies what claims can be causal vs. associational.
reports.algorithm: Identification proof + sensitivity analysis (e.g., Rotnitzky bounds)
reports.analyst_notes: Every causal claim must cite this. Non-causal findings labeled 'associational'.

reports.title: Career Friction & Attrition Dynamics
reports.description: Analyzes patterns of career exit (gaps > 2 years). Compares attrition rates by gender, role, and studio cohort.
reports.algorithm: Kaplan-Meier survival curves, Cox proportional hazards
reports.analyst_notes: Note: 'attrition' is narrow (credit gap) — may reflect freelance variability.

reports.title: Generational & Cohort Analysis
reports.description: Tracks career trajectories by entry cohort. Measures progression speed, peak timing, sustainability.
reports.analyst_notes: Cohorts show distinct lifecycle patterns. Early cohorts show sustainability; recent cohorts still ramping.

reports.title: Genre Ecosystem: Specialists & Crossovers
reports.description: Maps person expertise by genre. Identifies genre specialists vs. versatile generalists. Genre affinity scores.
reports.analyst_notes: Genre matters for niche expertise. Useful for identifying specialized talent pools.

reports.title: Studio Collaboration Network & Ecosystem
reports.description: Models studios as nodes with edges representing co-production and shared talent. Identifies studio clusters and competitive vs. cooperative dynamics.
reports.data_source: studio participation in anime + shared person affiliations
reports.analyst_notes: Studio concentration is primary policy concern. Shared talent indicates ecosystem openness.

reports.title: Confidence Interval Methodology & Validation
reports.description: Documents CI computation for all person-level estimates. Specifies whether analytical (SE formula) or bootstrap. Validates coverage.
reports.analyst_notes: All person-level estimates in public reports MUST include CIs. Blocking legal requirement.

reports.title: Dataset Statistics & Quality Report
reports.description: Summary statistics: anime count, credit count, person count, genres, date ranges. Data completeness metrics.
reports.analyst_notes: Sanity check on dataset size and composition.

reports.title: Performance Benchmarks Archive (Deprecated)
reports.description: Archive of 140+ performance profiling runs. Superseded by inline profiling and Rust acceleration.
reports.deprecation_reason: Pipeline performance normalized; Rust acceleration removed need for continuous benchmarking.
